reviews.comment:
Un camping normal :) muy bueno la verdad con cancha de fútbol parrillas y lugar para casas rodantes

(Translated by Google)
A normal campsite :) very good indeed with a soccer field, grills and a place for RVs
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNU1iX193RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo camping con quincho cerrado y otro abierto. Parrillas, baños y recreación como hamacas, sube y baja, pool, etc. Se cobra entrada por auto y por persona.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice campsite with an enclosed and an open barbecue area. Grills, restrooms, and recreational facilities such as hammocks, a seesaw, a pool table, etc. There is an entrance fee per car and per person.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBanNIdWhBRRAB
